name: Full 5pc Sports Value Bedding Set - Pillowfort™
description: Upgrade your kid's bedroom in sporty style with this 5-Piece Sports Value Bedding Set from Pillowfort™. The five-piece bedding set includes a full/queen comforter finished with print of different balls along with matching pillow shams, a football decorative pillow and a pom-pom throw blanket to give them loads of cozy options. Plus, the set is machine washable for easy cleaning.
